name: techmeme
title: Techmeme
description: Browse and search Techmeme from Raycast.
author: Tien-Lam

commands.name: techmeme
commands.title: Browse Techmeme
commands.description: Scan current Techmeme front page and river stories.

commands.name: river
commands.title: Techmeme River
commands.description: Browse Techmeme in reverse chronological order.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
